title: task
description: compact_cot.py:781 - alt_dm=int(alt_m * 10) can overflow int16 range (-32768 to 32767) for altitudes above 3276.7m or below -3276.8m. struct.pack('>h', alt_dm) then raises 'struct.error: short format requires SHRT_MIN <= number <= SHRT_MAX'. Failure scenario: Aircraft or high-altitude position at 5000m HAE causes compress_cot_xml() to raise unhelpful struct.error instead of clear validation error. Should clamp to valid range or raise ValueError with clear message.
